title: astragalus strictus
intro: Astragalus strictus, also known as Chinese milk vetch or Mongolian milk vetch, is a perennial plant in the legume family native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to promote overall health and well-being, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus strictus include reducing fatigue and improving physical performance, boosting the immune system, and protecting against oxidative stress and inflammation. Astragalus strictus can be consumed through various herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, teas, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
